sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115542" key="yeudoperi/pteros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδο-περίπτερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n115542.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with false peristyle,</tr_> of a temple in which the columns on the sides are attached to the walls instead of standing free, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.8.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
